name: @cat-factory/deploy-backend
description: Example Cloudflare Worker deployment of the @cat-factory/worker library. Carries the wrangler.toml + config; copy this package to deploy the backend on your own Cloudflare account.

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply cat_factory --local && wrangler d1 migrations apply cat_factory_telemetry --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply cat_factory --remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply cat_factory_telemetry --remote
